---
title: "Supersonic"
description: "⭐⭐⭐ 1/2"
date: "8/22/2025"
image: "supersonic.jpg"
categories: ["⭐⭐⭐ 1/2"]
---
  
Hearing them talk about why each of them were in the band made me understand why the band made them hate each other so much lol. However, you can tell that they do really love and respect each other on top of that. Hoping they tour one more time…
